indication: BLINCYTO is a bispecific CD19-directed CD3 T-cell engager indicated for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients one month and older with CD19-positive B-cell precursor acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL) in first or second complete remission with minimal residual disease (MRD) greater than or equal to 0.1%.
description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to blinatumomab for the treatment of adult and pediatric patients one month and older with CD19-positive B-cell precursor acute lymphoblastic leukemia (ALL) in first or second complete remission with minimal residual disease (MRD) greater than or equal to 0.1%.

document.name: Blincyto (blinatumomab) [package insert]. FDA.
